---
title: "Results and Impact"
---

::: {.lang-switcher}
[English](./results-impact.html) {.lang-link}
[Español](../es/results-impact.html) {.lang-link}
:::

## Results and Impact { .section-title }

Results should show more than model metrics. Pythia is strongest when the performance story is connected to user value, decision quality, or operational improvement.

::: {.page-grid}
::: {.award-card}
### Quantitative outcomes
Summarize the main metrics, comparative improvements, and benchmark performance clearly and honestly.
:::
::: {.award-card}
### Practical impact
Translate results into what the model enables in practice: faster decisions, better prioritization, improved forecasting, or clearer risk visibility.
:::
::: {.award-card}
### Presentation impact
The project’s recognition in grading and pitching demonstrates that technical quality was matched by communication quality.
:::
:::

## Suggested evidence to include

- Final metrics table
- Comparison with baselines
- Visual explanation of model behavior
- One short statement on business significance
